---
name: Stuck or confused
about: Track something you don't understand yet — future-you will thank you
title: "[Module XX] Brief description"
labels: question
---

**Which module / exercise?**

<!-- e.g., Module 07, Exercise 4 -->

**What I tried**

<!-- The commands you ran, what you expected, what happened -->

**What confused me**

<!-- Be specific. "I don't get it" is less useful than "I don't get why X happens when Y" -->

**What I checked first**

- [ ] man page for the command
- [ ] Re-read the book chapter
- [ ] Tried explainshell.com
- [ ] Searched the error message
- [ ] Asked an LLM / Stack Overflow

**Resolution (fill in when you figure it out)**

<!-- Even one sentence. This is the gold — your future self reads these. -->
